Description: The 1N5819xWS series are Schottky barrier diodes designed for high-efficiency switching applications. They feature a low forward voltage drop, a guard ring construction for transient protection, and exhibit negligible reverse recovery time and low reverse capacitance, making them suitable for fast switching circuits.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Negative terminal, marked by a band on the package body.

Pins.ElectricalType: Anode (Common for diodes, the band indicates cathode)
Cathode (Common for diodes, the body is typically anode)
